title: Paraguay vs France, FIFA World Cup 2026: Head-to-head record, form, predicted lineups ahead of Round of 16 match
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(jsonld:articleBody) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text: Paraguay vs France, FIFA World Cup 2026: Head-to-head record, form, predicted lineups ahead of Round of 16 match left France is looking to reach a third straight FIFA World Cup 2026 final. Getty Images Getty Images https://ss-i.thgim.com/public/incoming/emclfh/article71183464.ece/alternates/FREE_1200/2284107400.jpg AL BELLO EAST RUTHERFORD, NEW JERSEY - JUNE 30: Kylian Mbappe #10 of France celebrates with Dayot Upamecano #4 and Michael Olise #11 after scoring the team's third goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round Of 32 match between France and Sweden at New York New Jersey Stadium on June 30, 2026 in East Rutherford, New Jersey. Al Bello/Getty Images/AFP (Photo by AL BELLO / GETTY IMAGES NORTH AMERICA / Getty Images via AFP) The South Americans shocked Germany on penalties to advance while France eased past Sweden to get into the second round of knockouts. Chennai Paraguay will look to cause yet another upset in FIFA World Cup 2026 when it takes on France in the Round of 16 at the Philadelphia Stadium on Saturday. The South Americans shocked Germany on penalties to advance while France eased past Sweden to get into the second round of knockouts. Paraguay vs France head-to-head Played: 4 France: 2 Paraguay: 0 Draws: 2 In World Cups Played: 2 France: 2 Paraguay: 0 Form guide Paraguay: Germany 1-1 Paraguay (Paraguay won 4-3 on penalties) Paraguay 0-0 Australia Turkiye 0-1 Paraguay USA 4-1 Paraguay 4-0 Nicaragua France: France 3-0 Sweden Norway 1-4 France 3-0 Iraq France 3-1 Senegal France 3-1 Northern Ireland Predicted lineups Paraguay (4-4-2): Gill (gk), Caceres, Alonso, Canale, Gomez, Almiron, Cubas, Bobadilla, Galarza, Enciso, Avalos France (4-2-3-1): Maignan (gk), Kounde, Upamecano, Saliba, Theo Hernandez, Kone, Rabiot, Olise, Dembele, Barcola, Mbappe Played: 4 France: 2 Paraguay: 0 Draws: 2 Played: 2 France: 2 Paraguay: 0 Germany 1-1 Paraguay (Paraguay won 4-3 on penalties) Paraguay 0-0 Australia Turkiye 0-1 Paraguay USA 4-1 Paraguay 4-0 Nicaragua France 3-0 Sweden Norway 1-4 France 3-0 Iraq France 3-1 Senegal France 3-1 Northern Ireland
